data.biography: Gideon Mzembe bir aktör ve yaşam tarzı koçudur. Oyunculuğa ilk gençlik yıllarında tanınmış bir oyuncu koçu tarafından keşfedildikten sonra başladı. Gideon, New York Film Akademisi'nde eğitimini ilerletti ve hemen kısa filmler üzerinde çalışmaya başladı.
data.name: Gideon Mzembe

data.biography: Paul Chun is a Hong Kong actor. He has appeared in more than 130 films and television series since 1949. In 1966, he appeared in The Sand Pebbles, an American film produced and directed by Robert Wise.
data.name: Paul Chun Pui

data.biography:
秦沛（Paul Chun），1945年6月26日生于中国北京，香港影视演员。

1965年，秦沛奔赴台湾，任圆联影业公司演员，同年参演了电影《菟丝花》，并改艺名为“秦沛”。1976年起先后在香港佳兄电视台、丽的电视台和无线电视台做演员，参演《射雕英雄传》等电视剧。1986年主演其弟尔冬升执导的《癫佬正传》，获第六届香港电影金像奖最佳男配角奖。1993年再度参演尔冬升执导的《新不了情》，获第十三届香港电影金像奖最佳男配角奖。  1999年，主演TVB跨世纪台庆剧《创世纪》，饰演叶孝礼。 2009年，秦沛与范冰冰、周渝民合作，一起出演了年代大剧《金大班》。  2013年，秦沛出演了台湾导演小徐执导的电影《特工艾米拉》。 2016年，秦沛出演了由薛晓璐编剧执导的电影《北京遇上西雅图之不二情书》 ，并以此剧提名了53届台湾电影金马奖最佳男配角奖  。
data.name: 秦沛

data.biography:
秦沛（Paul Chun），1945 年 6 月 26 日生於中國北京，香港影視演員。

1965 年，秦沛奔赴台灣，任圓聯影業演員，同年參演了電影《菟絲花》，並改藝名為“秦沛”。

1976 年起先後在香港佳兄電視台、麗的電視台和無線電視台擔任演員，參演《射鵰英雄傳》等電視劇。

1986 年主演弟弟爾冬升執導的《癲佬正傳》，獲第六屆香港電影金像獎最佳男配角獎。

1993 年再度參演爾冬升執導的《新不了情》，獲第十三屆香港電影金像獎最佳男配角獎。

1999 年，主演 TVB 跨世紀台慶劇《創世紀》，飾演葉孝禮。

2009 年，秦沛與笵冰冰、周渝民合作，一起出演了年代大劇《金大班》。

2013 年，秦沛出演了台灣導演小許執導的電影《特務艾米拉》。

2016 年，秦沛出演了由薛曉璐編劇執導的電影《北京遇上西雅圖之不二情書》 ，並以此劇提名了 53 屆台灣電影金馬獎最佳男配角獎 。
data.name: 秦沛

data.biography: Beatrice Domond (born 1995) is a regular-footed American skateboarder from Miami, Florida.
data.name: Beatrice Domond

data.overview: Sau một vụ tai nạn xe hơi nghiêm trọng, nữ nhà báo Emily quyết định rời bỏ mọi thứ và đến vùng nông thôn nước Ý để tìm lại sự bình yên. Tuy nhiên, chuyến đi nhanh chóng biến thành cơn ác mộng khi cô bị giam giữ trong một nơi bí ẩn gọi là “Hầm Ngục Khoái Lạc”.
data.title: Hầm Ngục Khoái Lạc

data.biography:
Tee Thanapon Jarutitranon is an actor from Chiang Mai signed with Channel 3. He studied psychology at Kasetsart University.

Tee got his start in the entertainment industry when he won the 2012 Cool and Cute Thailand by GPad contest. He made his acting debut in 2016 playing the role of Tee in "Part Time the Series." He first came to prominence, however, when he landed the role of Dr. Beam in "2Moons."

Tee is a visual and support vocal in the five-member boy band SBFIVE. He's also a member of the duo TAE TEE.
data.name: Thanapon Jarujitranon

data.biography: Tanapol Jarujittranon (ธนพล จารุจิตรานนท์), mais conhecido como Tee, é um ator e cantor Tailandês. Ficou conhecido por interpretar o estudante de medicina Beam, na adaptação da novel de Chiffon Cake, 2 Moons: The Series. Desde 2017, faz parte da boyband SBFIVE, junto com outros 5 atores de 2 Moons.
塔纳朋·扎卢吉塔侬（Tee），1994年12月5日出生于泰国，毕业于泰国农业大学，泰国男演员、歌手。
data.name: 塔纳朋·扎卢吉塔侬
ธนพล จารุจิตรานนท์

data.biography: 塔納朋·紮盧吉塔儂（Tee），1994 年 12 月 5 日出生於泰國，畢業於泰國農業大學，泰國男演員、歌手。
data.name: 塔納朋·紮盧吉塔儂

data.biography: Laura Bilgeri is a young actress based in Los Angeles. Bilgeri began her acting career when she was 14 years old. She made her feature film debut in the film "A Breath Of Heaven", which won the Golden Rooster Award for best foreign film. Then she appeared in the popular German/Austrian TV Series Vienna Crime Squad. Laura gained international attention when she got a role in the 2014 World War I Drama "The Silent Mountain" along side film icon Claudia Cardinale ("Once Upon a Time in the West") and British actor William Moseley ("The Chronicles Of Narnia", "Royals") She also co-stared alongside Emmy Award winning actress Pamela Adlon in the new FX series "Better Things", directed by Louis C.K. Besides she's been working as a model in the US, Italy, Austria, Germany, Switzerland & China. Bilgeri was also featured in the new US wide Mazda Commercial, produced by Ridley Scott & directed by Jake Scott.
data.name: Laura Bilgeri

data.biography:
Alexa Davalos Dunas (born May 28, 1982) is an American actress. Her early role as Gwen Raiden on the fourth season of the TV series Angel (2002–03) was followed by some Hollywood films, including The Chronicles of Riddick (2004), Feast of Love (2007), The Mist (2007), Defiance (2008) and Clash of the Titans (2010). She has also appeared on the television series Reunion (2005–06) and in Frank Darabont's Mob City (2013). She starred as Juliana Crain, the main character in the Amazon Studios series The Man in the High Castle (2015–2019).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Alexa Davalos, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Alexa Davalos

data.biography: Alexa Davalos jest amerykańską aktorką. Urodziła się we Francji. W 2002 r. wystąpiła wraz z Charliem Hofheimerem w krótkometrażowym filmie 'The Ghost of F. Scott Fitzgerald', który został wyświetlony na festiwalu filmowym w Toronto. Rok później pojawiła się u boku Antonio Banderasa w filmie 'Pancho Villa we własnej osobie'. W 2004 zaliczyła swój debiut w filmie fabularnym, grając w 'Kronikach Riddicka' jako Kyra. Zagrała także w serialu 'Anioł Ciemności'(2003), a później w filmie 'Smaki miłości' m.in. u boku Morgana Freemana.

Alexa Davalos Dunas (* 28. Mai 1982 in Paris) ist eine französisch-US-amerikanische Schauspielerin und ehemaliges Model.

Als einzige Tochter des Fotografen Jeff Dunas und der Schauspielerin Elyssa Davalos – und damit Enkelin des Schauspielers Richard Davalos – 1982 in Paris geboren, verbrachte Alexa Davalos ihre Kindheit an wechselnden Wohnorten in Frankreich, Italien und den USA. Im Alter von siebzehn Jahren ließ sie sich in New York City nieder, wo sie als Model unter anderem für Fotograf Peter Lindbergh arbeitete.

Obwohl Davalos in ihrer Jugend die Schauspielerei ablehnte, erkannte die damals 19-Jährige im Jahr 2002 doch ihre Leidenschaft dafür. Sie begann ihre schauspielerische Karriere mit den Fernsehfilmen Untitled Secret Service Project und The Ghost of F. Scott Fitzgerald, der auf dem 27. Toronto International Film Festival gezeigt wurde, sowie Gastrollen in den Fernsehserien American Campus – Reif für die Uni? und Angel – Jäger der Finsternis.

An der Seite von Vin Diesel in Riddick: Chroniken eines Kriegers gelang ihr im Jahr 2004 der Durchbruch ins Hollywoodkino. Die Produktion der Fernsehserie Reunion mit Davalos in einer der Hauptrollen wurde 2006 nach 13 Episoden eingestellt. In Zauber der Liebe und Der Nebel war Davalos im Folgejahr wieder auf der Kinoleinwand zu sehen. In Defiance – Für meine Brüder, die niemals aufgaben von Regisseur Edward Zwick spielte sie im Jahr 2008 eine polnische Jüdin zur Zeit der nationalsozialistischen Besatzung. Davalos bestätigte das Gefühl einer gewissen Verbundenheit zu der von ihr verkörperten Figur und der Region, da ihre Vorfahren jüdisch-litauischen Ursprungs waren. Seit 2015 war sie in einer tragenden Rolle in der Serie The Man in the High Castle zu sehen. Die Serie endete 2019 nach vier Staffeln.

Davalos spricht insbesondere durch ihre mehrsprachige Erziehung fließend Französisch, Griechisch, Englisch und Spanisch. Aus ihrer bewegten Jugend heraus entwickelte sie laut eigener Aussage eine Leidenschaft fürs Reisen. Sie besitzt sowohl die französische als auch die US-amerikanische Staatsbürgerschaft.

美国女演员。她早期在电视连续剧《天使》（2002-03 年）第四季中饰演格温·雷电，随后出演了一些好莱坞电影，包括《里迪克编年史》（2004 年）、《爱的盛宴》（2007 年）、《迷雾》（2007 年）、《反抗》（2008 年）和《泰坦之战》（2010 年）。她还出演了电视连续剧《留尼汪岛》（2005-06）和弗兰克·达拉邦特的《黑帮城市》（2013）。她饰演朱莉安娜·克雷恩（Juliana Crain），她是亚马逊工作室系列《高城堡里的人》（2015-2019）中的主角。
data.name: 艾莉克莎·黛沃洛斯

data.biography: 美國女演員。她早期在電視聯續劇《天使》（2002 - 03 年）第四季中飾演格温·雷電，隨後出演了一些好萊塢電影，包括《裏迪克編年史》（2004 年）、《愛的盛宴》（2007 年）、《霧地異煞》（2007 年）、《反抗》（2008 年）和《泰坦之戰》（2010 年）。她還出演了電視聯續劇《留尼汪島》（2005 - 06）和弗蘭克·達拉邦特的《黑幫城市》（2013）。她飾演朱莉安娜·克雷恩（Juliana Crain），她是亞馬遜工作室系列《高城堡裏的人》（2015 - 2019）中的主角。

data.overview: Khát khao tìm kiếm khởi đầu mới, một y tá rời Los Angeles đến thị trấn hẻo lánh phía bắc California rồi hoàn toàn bất ngờ trước con người và cuộc sống ở đây.

data.name: Luyện Khí Mười Vạn Năm
data.overview: Mười vạn năm trước Thiên Lam Tông vang dội giới tu chân, đệ tử trong tông đều là những đứa con của trời, đánh đâu thắng đó. Chỉ có khai sơn đệ tử Từ Dương vẫn luôn ở Luyện Khí kỳ, để đột phá tu vi sớm ngày phi thăng, Từ Dương bế quan vạn năm. Ai ngờ trong thời gian bế quan giới tu chân đã xuống dốc, Thiên Lam Tông cũng chỉ còn vài ba đệ tử, thấy sắp phải đối mặt với diệt tông, Từ Dương đánh bại cường địch, thề sẽ dẫn dắt Thiên Lam Tông quay về đỉnh cao!

data.biography: ​Louis Mandylor (born 13 September 1966) is an Australian film and television actor.Mandylor has enjoyed success in US television shows, such as a prominent guest appearance on Relic Hunter with Tia Carrere. Louis is probably most famous for his role in the movie My Big Fat Greek Wedding. Other major roles include playing Louis Malone in Martial Law alongside Sammo Hung. However, the show only lasted two seasons, with Mandylor being dropped at the end of its first season. Mandylor appeared in the sitcom Friends, pretending to be Joey's twin in "The One With Unagi". Additionally, he appeared in the third season of CSI: Miami as a robber/killer. He and his brother Costas have acted alongside each other in the Charmed episode "Saving Private Leo" and a short movie written and produced by Louis entitled My Brother Cicero. Louis portrayed Deputy Lloyd in the Syfy thriller film The Cursed, he stars alongside his brother Costas. One of his more popular roles was that of Bobby DeLuca in the cult-classic Suckers, where he plays a good-guy turned car salesman.
data.name: Louis Mandylor

data.biography: Австралийский актёр греческого происхождения, известный, главным образом, по роли Ника, брата главной героини Тулы Портокалос, в американском комедийном фильме 2002 года «Моя большая греческая свадьба» и его сиквеле 2016 года «Моя большая греческая свадьба 2», а также по сериалу «Китайский городовой» в роли детектива Луиса Мэлоуна. Младший брат Костаса Мэндилора.
data.name: Луис Мэндилор

ルイス・マンディロア

data.biography: Louis Mandylor (ur. 13 września 1966) jest australijskim aktorem filmowym i telewizyjnym. Mandylor odniósł sukces w amerykańskich programach telewizyjnych, takich jak gościnny występ w Łowcy skarbów z Tią Carrere. Louis jest prawdopodobnie najbardziej znany ze swojej roli w filmie Moje wielkie greckie wesele. Inne ważne role obejmują rolę Louisa Malone'a w Stan wyjątkowy u boku Sammo Hunga. Jednak program trwał tylko dwa sezony, a Mandylor został usunięty pod koniec pierwszego sezonu. Mandylor pojawił się w sitcomie Przyjaciele, udając bliźniaka Joey'a w "The One With Unagi". Ponadto pojawił się w trzecim sezonie CSI: Miami jako rabuś/morderca. On i jego brat Costas grali u boku siebie w odcinku Czarodziejki "Saving Private Leo" i krótkometrażowym filmie napisanym i wyprodukowanym przez Louisa zatytułowanym My Brother Cicero. Louis zagrał zastępcę Lloyda w thrillerze Syfy The Cursed, występuje u boku swojego brata Costasa. Jedną z jego popularniejszych ról była rola Bobby'ego DeLuca w kultowym filmie Suckers, gdzie zagrał dobrego chłopaka, który stał się sprzedawcą samochodów.
路易斯·曼迪魯（Louis Mandylor，1966 年 9 月 13 日-），澳大利亞影視演員。
data.name: 路易斯·曼迪魯

data.biography: Matthew Chandler Fox (born July 14, 1966) is an American actor and former model. His first major role was playing older brother and family patriarch Charlie Salinger on Party of Five in the 1990s, co-starring with Scott Wolf, Neve Campbell, Jennifer Love Hewitt, and Lacey Chabert. He is also known for his role as Dr. Jack Shephard on the ABC drama series Lost.
data.name: Matthew Fox

data.biography:
Matthew Fox (Abington Township, Pennsylvania, 1966. július 14.–) amerikai színész.

Leginkább televíziós sorozatokból ismert. Első jelentősebb tévés szerepe Charlie Salinger volt az Ötösfogat című sorozatban (1994-2000). Nagyobb ismertségre a Lost – Eltűntek című misztikus sorozatban tett szert, Jack Shephard megformálásával, 2004 és 2010 között. Alakításáért Golden Globe- és Primetime Emmy-díjra jelölték, több Szaturnusz-díjat megnyert, illetve a sorozat többi szereplőjével közösen egy Screen Actors Guild-díjat is kapott.

A sorozatok mellett több mozifilmben is játszott, köztük a Nyolc tanú (2008) című akciófilmben, A háború császára (2012) című történelmi drámában és a Csontok és skalpok (2015) című horrorfilmben.
马修·钱德勒·福克斯（Matthew Chandler Fox，1966年7月14日-），美国演员、前模特。他的第一个主要角色是在 1990 年代的《五人派对》中扮演哥哥和家族族长查理·塞林格，与斯科特·沃尔夫、尼芙·坎贝尔、詹妮弗·洛芙·休伊特和莱西·查伯特共同主演。他还因在 ABC 电视剧《迷失》中饰演杰克·谢泼德博士而闻名。
data.name: 马修·福克斯

data.biography: 馬修·錢德勒·福克斯（Matthew Chandler Fox，1966 年 7 月 14 日-），美國演員、前模特。他的第一個主要角色是在 1990 年代的《五人派對》中扮演哥哥和家族族長查理·塞林格，與斯科特·沃爾夫、尼芙·坎貝爾、詹妮弗·洛芙·休伊特和萊西·查伯特共同主演。他還因在 ABC 電視劇《迷失》中飾演傑克·謝潑德博士而聞名。
data.name: 馬修·福克斯

data.biography:
Matthew Fox, 14 Temmuz 1966'da Abington, Pennsylvania'da dünyaya geldi. Annesi ve babası, Wyoming'deki Crow Creek rezervasyonunda sığır yetiştiriciliği yapan bir çiftlik sahibiydi. Çocukluğunun büyük bir kısmını burada geçiren Fox, lise eğitimini Massachusetts'teki Deerfield Akademisi'nde tamamladı. Ardından Columbia Üniversitesi'ne giderek ekonomi eğitimi aldı ve 1989 yılında mezun oldu. Ancak kader ağlarını örerken, bir arkadaşının annesi olan bir modellik ajansı yetkilisiyle tanışmasıyla hayatı farklı bir yöne evrildi ve modellik yapmaya başladı. Bu süreç, onu oyunculuk dünyasına adım atmaya teşvik etti.

Oyunculuk kariyerine 1992 yılında "Wings" adlı dizide küçük bir rolle başlayan Fox, ilk önemli çıkışını 1994 yılında başlayan ve beş sezon süren aile drama dizisi "Party of Five" ile yakaladı. Bu dizide canlandırdığı Charlie Salinger karakteriyle geniş kitleler tarafından tanındı ve gençlik idolü haline geldi. Dizi, ona birçok hayran kazandırırken, eleştirel beğeni de topladı.

"Party of Five"ın ardından Matthew Fox, çeşitli televizyon projelerinde ve filmlerde rol aldı. Ancak onu küresel bir fenomen haline getiren ve kariyerinin zirvesine taşıyan rol, 2004 yılında başlayan ve tüm dünyayı saran gizemli bilim kurgu drama dizisi "Lost"taki Dr. Jack Shephard karakteri oldu. Jack Shephard, uçak kazasından kurtulanların lideri rolüyle izleyicilerin kalbinde taht kurdu. "Lost", altı sezon boyunca yayınlandı ve televizyon tarihinin en ikonik dizilerinden biri haline geldi. Dizideki performansı, Fox'a sayısız adaylık ve ödül getirdi ve onu uluslararası bir yıldıza dönüştürdü.

"Lost" sonrası dönemde Matthew Fox, kariyerine sinema filmleriyle devam etti. Aksiyon ve gerilim türlerindeki filmlerde yer alarak farklı rollerde kendini denedi. 2008 yapımı aksiyon gerilim filmi "Vantage Point"ta (Bakış Açısı) rol aldı. 2012 yılında Tyler Perry ile birlikte "Alex Cross" filminde seri katil Picasso'yu canlandırarak kariyerindeki en kötü karakterlerden birine hayat verdi. Aynı yıl, eleştirmenlerden övgü alan ve Tom Hardy ile Guy Pearce'ın başrollerini paylaştığı suç filmi "Lawless"ta küçük ama akılda kalıcı bir rol üstlendi.

2013 yılında gişe rekorları kıran zombi filmi "World War Z"de (Dünya Savaşı Z) Brad Pitt ile birlikte yer aldı. 2015 yapımı Western filmi "Bone Tomahawk"taki performansıyla da dikkat çekti. Daha sonra 2022'de Peacock'ta yayınlanan gerilim dizisi "Last Light" ile televizyona geri döndü.

Matthew Fox, kariyeri boyunca hem eleştirel beğeni toplayan performanslarıyla hem de geniş kitlelere ulaşan projeleriyle adından söz ettirmiştir. Özellikle "Party of Five" ve "Lost" dizileriyle televizyon tarihine adını altın harflerle yazdırmıştır.

data.name: マシュー・フォックス

data.biography: From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.  Jemma Powell is a British actress. She graduated from the Oxford School of Drama in 2002.  Powell made her screen debut in 2001, in The Hole. She is known for her roles in films such as François Ozon's Angeland Tim Burton's Alice in Wonderland. She played Maliika in Dan Wilde's Alpha Male also starring Danny Huston andJennifer Ehle.  Her theatre work includes The Cherry Orchard, directed by Dominic Dromgoole. She played Anya.
data.name: Jemma Powell
